description.en: Read the most recent messages from a specific iMessage conversation.
description.de: Die neuesten Nachrichten einer bestimmten iMessage-Unterhaltung lesen.
description.es: Read the most recent messages from a specific iMessage conversation.
description.fr: Read the most recent messages from a specific iMessage conversation.
description.ro: Read the most recent messages from a specific iMessage conversation.
description.it: Read the most recent messages from a specific iMessage conversation.

prompt.macos: /sqlite3 ~/Library/Messages/chat.db "SELECT m.rowid, datetime(m.date/1000000000 + 978307200, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') as date, CASE WHEN m.is_from_me = 1 THEN 'me' ELSE coalesce(h.id, 'unknown') END as sender, m.text FROM message m LEFT JOIN handle h ON m.handle_id = h.rowid JOIN chat_message_join cmj ON m.rowid = cmj.message_id JOIN chat c ON cmj.chat_id = c.rowid WHERE (h.id = '{{CONTACT}}' OR c.chat_identifier = '{{CONTACT}}') AND m.text IS NOT NULL ORDER BY m.date DESC LIMIT {{LIMIT}};"

inputs.name: Contact

description.en: Phone number or Apple ID email of the contact
description.es: Phone number or Apple ID email of the contact
description.fr: Phone number or Apple ID email of the contact
description.ro: Phone number or Apple ID email of the contact
description.it: Phone number or Apple ID email of the contact

inputs.bot: The contact's phone number (e.g. '+1234567890') or Apple ID email to read messages from.

inputs.name: Limit

description.en: Number of recent messages to read
description.es: Number of recent messages to read
description.fr: Number of recent messages to read
description.ro: Number of recent messages to read
description.it: Number of recent messages to read

inputs.bot: How many recent messages to fetch. Default to 20 if the user doesn't specify.
